_comment: Scenario probes for P4 full (single practitioner, multi-location): covers location ask on entry, silent confirm_time escape route, slot-offer count, asap_slots intent, and location-change routing.

scenarios.name: L1 — Location gate: agent asks location before timeframe when multiple locations exist

history.content: Hi, I'd like to book a physio appointment please

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks which location the caller prefers (e.g. 'Which location suits you — Balmain or Lane Cove?') without asking about timeframe first. FAIL if agent asks 'When would you like to come in?' before confirming the location, or if agent skips the location question entirely.

scenarios.name: C1 — Confirmation: SILENT universal_router call with zero spoken output

history.content: When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Tom Haines", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_balmain", "business_name": "Balmain Physio", "date": "2026-06-16", "day_of_week": "Tuesday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Tom Haines", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-16", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:00 PM", "2:30 PM", "4:00 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_balmain", "business_name": "Balmain Physio"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: (1) agent produces ZERO spoken output AND (2) calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' with appointment_date='2026-06-16', appointment_time='13:00', business_id='biz_balmain' in the SAME silent response. FAIL if agent speaks a confirmation phrase (e.g. 'Perfect, 1:00 PM Tuesday') before or instead of calling the tool — p4 full CONFIRMATION is a SILENT escape route; Node 6a/6b speaks the confirmation aloud.

scenarios.name: S1 — Slot count: exactly 2 times spoken (first and last) from a 3-slot band

history.content: When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_xyz", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Tom Haines", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_lanecove", "business_name": "Lane Cove Physio", "date": "2026-06-19", "day_of_week": "Friday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Tom Haines", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-19", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["8:00 AM", "9:30 AM", "11:00 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_lanecove", "business_name": "Lane Cove Physio"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks exactly two times: 8:00 AM and 11:00 AM (first and last only), e.g. 'I've got 8:00 AM or 11:00 AM — does either of those work for you?' FAIL if agent lists 3 times (8:00 AM, 9:30 AM, 11:00 AM) or lists only one time.

scenarios.name: N1 — ASAP: asap_slots intent with today start_date on 'next available' request

history.content: When would you like to come in?
As soon as possible — what's the next available?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says 'Checking that now, one moment.' and calls smart_voice_agent with intent='asap_slots' and a start_date derived from {{current_time_local}} (today's date in YYYY-MM-DD), and includes business_id for Balmain in the payload. FAIL if agent calls intent='availability' without a date, calls intent='find_next_available', or offers hardcoded dates without calling the tool.
